entities.name: Vrijen Attawar
entities.context: Owner of the knowledge system, implied user of the voice transformation process

entities.name: VoiceTransformer
entities.context: Python class from N5.scripts.voice_transformer used to transform content into different voice angles

entities.name: N5
entities.context: Organization/system that provides scripts including voice_transformer module

entities.name: Angle-Based Voice Generation
entities.context: Framework for generating multiple voice variations (angles) from a base draft

entities.name: Hybrid Voice Structure
entities.context: Combines v2.0 natural prose with v1.0 structural elements and strategic breaks

entities.name: Style-Free Draft
entities.context: Neutral starting content before voice transformation is applied

entities.name: Angle Evaluation
entities.context: Process of scoring voice angles for strengths and weaknesses

entities.name: Angle Selection
entities.context: Process of choosing the best voice angle from generated candidates

entities.name: Voice Validation
entities.context: Final check for voice consistency and anti-pattern compliance

relationships.context: Implied user of the voice transformation system
Implements the angle-based voice transformation workflow
Applies hybrid v2.0/v1.0 structure as part of transformation
Takes style-free draft as input for transformation
Evaluation results inform the selection of best angle
Selected angle is then validated before final output
